## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the current limitation?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, links to relevant Microsoft Graph docs/endpoints, or other context.
